title: hephaestus-panel05-nb2-anchored
prompt: You are given two reference images. IMAGE 1 is the rough composition for this shot — keep its framing and staging. IMAGE 2 is the STYLE ANCHOR — match its exact painterly concept-art style, palette, and brushwork (this keeps the shot-set consistent). STORY CONTEXT: a cast-out smith builds golden beings for others, taking quiet pride; beneath the warmth the first hairline crack — does the made thing look back? SHOT: close-up of one gold automaton's serene face, three-quarter profile turned screen-LEFT toward its unseen maker; its eyes just opening, a faint inner light waking. Hand-wrought seams, matte hammered gold, not chrome. Cool blue key, warm welder-rim; the ranks of identical others soft and blurred behind so this one reads as singular. ONE finished full-frame cinematic image — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact painterly cinematic concept-art style, palette, color, and rendering of the style-anchor reference — cool electric blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze, visible brushwork.
